measurement_note: Size is 2^N, the number of possible completed-course masks. The legal even N = 6/8/10 tiers therefore use sizes 64/256/1024, a 16x span. The relation from course 1 to course N prevents the no-prerequisite shortcut while leaving many subset states reachable under k = 2. Generating exact-k combinations only from available courses follows the reviewed subset-DP bound. A correct baseline that tests every full-universe mask at every reachable state completes at N = 10 and is rejected by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 6 courses with one gating relation
benchmark: 8 courses with one gating relation
benchmark: 10 courses with one gating relation
